english translation text: Aa Ay Mere Hussain Mere Godh May AajaOH MY HUSSAIN! COME INTO MY ARMS(Syeda Fatima s.a telling Imam Hussain a.s.)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:

COME MY CHILD, COME INTO MY ARMS
@HujjatELC

urdu transliteration text:
Ashoor Ka Suraj Hai Qayamat Ki Ghadi HaiBhai Ka Gala Kat-tha Behan Dekh Rahi HaiMakhtal May Kisi Maa Ki Sada Goonj Rahi Hai
THE SISTER IS WATCHING HER BROTHER'S NECK BEING SEVERED
@HujjatELC
Aa Ay Mere Hussain Mere Godh May Aaja- Oh my Hussain Come into my lap
english translation text:
THE SUN OF ASHURA IS SCORCHING, THE HOUR OF CALAMATY IS HERE
A MOTHER'S CRY (SYEDA FATIMA S.A.) IS ECHOING IN THE BATTLEFIELD

O MY SON! YOU ARE LIKE ALI ASGHER FOR ME,
MY LAP IS LIKE A CRADLE FOR YOU,
IN THIS SCORCHING SUN, MY VEIL IS A COVER FOR YOU

AS A MOTHER IT IS PAINFUL TO SEE THIS,
YOUR FRAIL BODY IN THIS BURNING DESERT,
AND THE CALAMITY IS THAT YOU REMAIN THIRSTY

I WILL TAKE YOU IN MY LAP, AND HUG YOU TO MY CHEST,
I WILL PUT YOU TO SLEEP ON MY CHEST LIKE SAKINA,
I WILL GENTLY TAKE OUT THE ARROWS FROM YOUR CHEST

WHEN YOU USED TO COME AND SLEEP IN MY LAP,
I NEVER MOVED IN SPITE OF THE DIFFCULTY IN GRINDING THE GRAIN,
NOW HOW I CAN LEAVE YOU ALL ALONE IN THIS BATTLEFIELD

YOU ALSO HAVE CHILDREN, YOU ARE ALSO A FATHER,
YOU KNOW WHAT IT IS TO SUFFER THE PAIN OF ONE'S CHILD,
WHICH MOTHER IS ABLE TO ENDURE THE GRIEF OF HER CHILD

YOU LAY DOWN ON THE BURNING SAND FROM SHEER EXHAUSTION,
WHOSE BLOOD DO YOU HAVE ON YOUR BEAUTIFUL FACE,
DO NOT SLEEP ON THE SAND MY SON, YOUR MOTHER IS HERE

I CAN SEE WHAT YOU ARE SUFFERING IN YOUR HEART,
I FOLLOWED YOU EVERY TIME YOU WENT TO PICK UP THE BODY OF A MARTYR,
NOW I WILL SAY WHAT I USED TO TELL YOU IN YOUR CHILDHOOD
